caption: In a podcast studio setting, a man wearing a white dress shirt, a red and white bow tie, glasses, and large over-ear headphones speaks into a microphone. He wears a distinctive, tall, pointed grey wig. Behind him is a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs. To his left, a professional microphone on a boom arm is visible, with a logo that reads "TOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Another logo on the right side of the screen also reads "TOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man is talking, and his facial expressions and slight head movements shift as he speaks. He remains seated in the same position, with his arms crossed or resting, while the camera maintains a steady medium shot. The background remains static, showing various frames and a "LEE" branded item on a shelf.
